stemHtml: How does cold air advection affect the true vertical distance between flight levels?

options.a: The advection of cold air means advection of denser air, thus the distance between the flight levels is reduced.
options.b: The true distance between flight levels is defined by standard regulations and does not depend on the weather conditions.
options.c: The accelerated air-flow lowers the pressure (Bernoulli-effect), thus the distance between the flight levels is reduced.
options.d: The advection of cold air means advection of heavier air, so the distance between two flight levels increases.
